_comment: River Bankers species starter card data. 12 cards (3 per species × 4 species). Source: sim.js STRUCT_CARDS species block. Starters are pre-built in the tableau at setup — they have no fish or material cost, just a VP and (optionally) an effect.

cards.name: Lodge Foundation
cards.effect: When you build a structure that uses Logs, advance 1 fewer fish (min 1).

cards.name: Tail Slap
cards.effect: At the start of your turn, you may pay 1 fish to drop a blank on any uncovered icon on a River 1 card.

cards.name: Beaver Cache
cards.effect: +1 to your hand size. When built, draw a structure card.

cards.name: Kelp Bed
cards.effect: Reeds icons cost you 1 less fish per item (min 1).

cards.name: Rolling Float
cards.effect: Once per game, swap one of your workers on a river card with another worker on a different card in the same river slot. No fish cost.

cards.name: Stone Tool
cards.effect: Once per game, when building, 1 of your Stones workers may substitute for any other material.

cards.name: Mud Burrow
cards.effect: Mud icons cost you 1 less fish per item (min 1).

cards.name: Channel Clearer
cards.effect: At the start of your turn, you may pay 1 fish to discard 1 worker from any Reeds river card (not a wild card); it returns to that player's supply without a blank.

cards.name: Marsh Lookout
cards.effect: Peek at the top card of the material deck at any time.

cards.name: Clay Den
cards.effect: Clay icons cost you 2 less fish per item (min 1).

cards.name: Quick Strike
cards.effect: When you trigger an auction, you may declare your bid last (after all other bids are revealed). You must still bid at least 1 worker, as the trigger always does.

cards.name: Snare Set
cards.effect: Once per game, force an opponent to recall one of their workers from a river card (drops a blank). The opponent slides back 3 fish in compensation.
